sources: RapidAPI Hub + no-code platform gaps (10 API leads)
Freelance platform registration status (8 platforms checked)
gh_bounty_note: Found 3 active bounty programs this week via GitHub issues search. Opire.io (USD), SolFoundry (FNDRY tokens), RustChain (RTC tokens). No LayerBank or traditional IssueHunt activity this week.

leads.name: Claude Design
leads.what_they_need: Content creators, YouTubers, tutorial makers, integration partners
leads.expected_budget: very_high (enterprise deals)
leads.notes: Major Anthropic launch 2026-04-17. Very selective — go through official devrel channels, not cold Twitter DMs.

leads.name: Grok Voice API
leads.what_they_need: Integration partners, developers to build on API, voice-enabled app builders
leads.expected_budget: medium-high
leads.notes: Fresh xAI launch 2026-04-17. High brand energy, likely seeking integration partners actively. Good candidate for API partnership deals.

leads.name: React Email 6.0
leads.what_they_need: Developer advocacy, template pack creators, plugin integrations, marketing
leads.expected_budget: medium
leads.notes: Resend is very community-oriented. Very responsive on Twitter. Template packs, starter kits, and email integration docs are welcome contributions.

leads.name: Vercel Flags
leads.what_they_need: Case studies, content marketing, integration docs for non-Vercel platforms
leads.how_to_reach: @vercel on Twitter, Vercel Discord, GitHub vercel/vercel
leads.expected_budget: high (enterprise)
leads.notes: Enterprise-grade product. May need third-party consultants to build integration content. Good for devrel/content agency relationships.

leads.name: Notebooks in Gemini
leads.what_they_need: Integration partners for Gemini workspace plugins
leads.expected_budget: very_high
leads.notes: Hard to partner directly. Focus on building tools that complement or integrate with Gemini rather than direct partnership.

leads.name: Tavily AI Search
leads.what_they_need: Zapier/Make/n8n connector — they have freemium users but no no-code integration
leads.how_to_reach: RapidAPI dashboard DM, Twitter @tavily_ai, GitHub tavily-ai/tavily-python
leads.expected_budget: revenue_share (20-30% of RapidAPI calls via your integration)
leads.revenue_model: Build once, earn ongoing usage revenue share. Freemium base = large potential upgrade funnel.

leads.name: Jina AI Reader API
leads.what_they_need: Zapier/Make/n8n connector for non-technical users
leads.how_to_reach: GitHub jinaai/jina, Twitter @jinaai, RapidAPI direct message
leads.expected_budget: revenue_share + affiliate
leads.revenue_model: API call pass-through markup. Massive developer base = high upgrade potential.

leads.name: Abstract APIs (Email/Phone/VAT Validation)
leads.what_they_need: CRM and sales automation integrations for Zapier/Make
leads.expected_budget: revenue_share
leads.revenue_model: Lead enrichment + data cleaning pipelines. High demand from CRM automation users.

leads.name: Firecrawl / ScrapeNinja
leads.what_they_need: No-code platform integrations (Zapier/Make/n8n)
leads.expected_budget: usage-based revenue share
leads.revenue_model: AI data pipeline boom = massive demand. Structure as bundled data packages.

leads.name: IPQualityScore
leads.what_they_need: E-commerce fraud automation for Shopify/WooCommerce Zapier pipelines
leads.expected_budget: volume-based revenue share
leads.revenue_model: Rising e-commerce fraud awareness = growing market. White-label plugin licensing.

leads.outreach_template: Your API has [X] monthly searches on RapidAPI but zero Zapier integrations — we can change that. Offer: build the Zapier/Make integration in exchange for revenue share (20-30%) on calls generated through the integration + featured placement in your docs.

leads.name: open-webui
leads.what_they_need: Frontend React/TypeScript, RAG improvements, MCP integrations, Docker optimizations, documentation translations
leads.how_to_reach: GitHub issues, Discord community, @openwebui on Twitter
leads.expected_budget: GitHub Sponsors recognition + potential sponsor tier for sustained contributors
leads.notes: High-growth AI UI project. Active GitHub Sponsors org. Great for AI/LLM portfolio work.

leads.name: openclaw
leads.what_they_need: Skills framework development, browser automation, gateway improvements, MCP server integrations
leads.expected_budget: GitHub Sponsors org + potential contributor sponsorship tiers
leads.notes: 360k stars, 73k forks. Massive AI assistant framework. Great for TypeScript/Node.js AI agent portfolio.

leads.name: yt-dlp
leads.what_they_need: New video site extractors, bug fixes (2,476 open issues), platform testing
leads.expected_budget: Recognition + potential GitHub Sponsors if sustained contributions
leads.notes: High-volume bug queue. Great for Python contributors wanting scraping/extraction experience.

leads.name: excalidraw
leads.what_they_need: React/TypeScript frontend, real-time collaboration, mobile app, performance optimization, a11y
leads.expected_budget: GitHub Sponsors + potential future employment/contracting with excalidraw.com
leads.notes: 121k stars. Massive community. Excellent TypeScript/React portfolio builder.

leads.name: frp (fast reverse proxy)
leads.what_they_need: Go backend programming, new proxy protocol support, TLS hardening, documentation
leads.expected_budget: Maintainer GitHub Sponsors — clean Go project, great for production portfolio
leads.notes: 106k stars, 41 open issues = very manageable. Good for Go developers wanting production networking experience.

leads.name: uptime-kuma
leads.what_they_need: Bug fixes (DB pooling), new monitor types, notification integrations, Docker improvements
leads.expected_budget: Louis Lam has active GitHub Sponsors — recognized contributors can earn sponsor tier
leads.notes: Well-known self-hosted tool. Maintainer is responsive and has working sponsorship.

leads.name: tech-interview-handbook
leads.what_they_need: Algorithm solutions, behavioral content, system design, translations — non-code contributions welcome
leads.expected_budget: GitHub Sponsors recognition + community visibility
leads.notes: 138k stars, only 44 open issues. Great for non-coding contributions: writing, translating.

leads.name: Arc.dev
leads.types_of_work: Freelance and full-time remote for devs, designers, PMs, marketers. 60+ specialties.
leads.typical_rates: Above-market — determined by profile and negotiation
leads.how_to_join: Create profile at arc.dev/talent → complete vetting tests → receive interview invites
leads.highlights: 4.2K+ matches, $45M+ earned by freelancers, no upfront cost
leads.notes: Best actionable option right now. Apply immediately if you have 5+ years experience and good English.

leads.name: Gun.io
leads.types_of_work: Vetted Java, Python, JS, full-stack engineers for enterprise clients
leads.typical_rates: Premium/above-market — positions as high-stakes engineering talent
leads.how_to_join: app.gun.io/sign-up — platform handles vetting, contracts, global payroll
leads.highlights: ~4K JS devs, ~2.8K Python devs on platform, multi-currency payroll, compliance included
leads.notes: Good for enterprise-focused developers. Platform takes care of contracts and tax compliance globally.

leads.name: Upwork
leads.types_of_work: Broad marketplace: software, mobile, AI/ML, design, marketing, writing
leads.how_to_join: upwork.com → free account → complete profile → bid on jobs. Connects to enterprise clients.
leads.highlights: World's largest freelance marketplace. Connects directly to enterprise clients.
leads.notes: Easiest open door but very competitive. Build portfolio fast and target specialized niches to stand out.

do_not_waste_time_on.name: Toptal
do_not_waste_time_on.why: Invite-only, 5% acceptance rate, still worth applying if you have elite credentials

do_not_waste_time_on.name: Turing
do_not_waste_time_on.why: Application-only, vet-heavy, but highest-paying if you pass

leads.name: Hacktron
leads.what_they_need: Security community outreach, blog posts, YouTube tutorials, GitHub Actions/GitLab CI integration
leads.expected_budget: low-medium — equity or early access deal possible
leads.notes: AI security tool for CI/CD pipelines. Security communities on Twitter/Reddit/Discord are good outreach channels.

leads.name: Hipocampus
leads.what_they_need: Productivity YouTubers, Twitter tech influencers, productivity community outreach
leads.expected_budget: low — early stage, co-marketing deal likely
leads.notes: AI agents for team workflows. Good for productivity/remote work YouTubers and newsletters.

leads.name: Sharpsana
leads.what_they_need: Startup community outreach, SaaS integration (Slack, Notion, Linear), Product Hunt visibility
leads.how_to_reach: Twitter search Sharpsana AI, GitHub search sharpsana
leads.expected_budget: low — ambitious indie AI agent, good for partnership if you share audience
leads.notes: Full-stack startup AI agent. Could benefit from startup ecosystem communities like Product Hunt, Hacker News, indie hacker Slack.

leads.name: Android CLI
leads.what_they_need: Documentation help, mobile dev community outreach, iOS expansion partnership
leads.expected_budget: low — solo indie dev
leads.notes: AI-powered Android app builder. Could expand to iOS — partnership opportunity for mobile devs.

leads.name: Cerberus
leads.what_they_need: Cursor community YouTubers, AI coding agent Reddit/Discord communities
leads.expected_budget: low — niche dev tool for Cursor power users
leads.notes: Cursor plugin to prevent AI going out of scope. Very specific niche — Cursor community on Reddit/Discord is best channel.

leads.name: .MD This Page
leads.what_they_need: Tech Twitter sharing, browser extension store reviews, Product Hunt launch boost
leads.expected_budget: low — simple utility tool, freemium browser extension model
leads.notes: Page-to-Markdown converter. Good for tech Twitter threads and browser extension marketplace distribution.

leads.name: Opire.io
leads.what_they_need: Devs, builders, automation engineers

active_bounties_usd.title: Claude Code skill for CHANGELOG.md generation
CLAUDE.md template for Next.js 15 + SQLite SaaS
Claude Code pre-tool-use hook for dangerous commands
n8n workflow for weekly GitHub repo narrative summary

leads.how_to_find: Search 'powered by Opire' on GitHub issues, or visit opire.io
leads.payout: USD, direct to contributor on acceptance

leads.name: SolFoundry (FNDRY Token)
leads.what_they_need: Frontend, Backend, Agent, Creative, Integration devs

top_bounties_fnrdy.title: Email Notification System for Bounty Updates
Telegram Bot for New Bounty Notifications
GitHub Issue Scraper for Foundry Bounties
VS Code Extension for Browsing Bounties

leads.how_to_find: Search '$FNDRY' on GitHub issues, labels: bounty, tier-1, tier-2, tier-3

leads.name: RustChain (RTC Token)
leads.what_they_need: Rust devs, security researchers
leads.how_to_find: Search 'Code Review Bounty RustChain' or 'Ongoing Bug Bounty RustChain' on GitHub
leads.payout: RTC tokens, payout within 24h of merge/acceptance

leads.name: Zama Bounty Program
leads.type: FHE (Fully Homomorphic Encryption) OSS bug bounties
leads.what_they_need: Cryptography researchers, Rust/Go security devs

leads.name: arkadiyt/bounty-targets-data
leads.what_they_need: Bug bounty hunters wanting to find in-scope targets on HackerOne/Bugcrowd/Intigriti
leads.payout: Not a bounty program itself — tooling for bounty hunters

immediate_this_week: 1. Apply to Arc.dev and Gun.io (both open registration, above-market pay)
2. Identify 2-3 RapidAPI APIs with no Zapier integration, draft outreach using template
3. Engage with Resend (React Email 6.0) on Twitter — offer template pack or integration
4. Post on Product Hunt for Hipocampus/Hacktron sharpsana — offer co-marketing
this_month: 1. Pick 1-2 GitHub sponsors projects (frp or tech-interview-handbook = low barrier, fast wins)
2. Build n8n community node for Tavily or Jina AI — submit to n8n.io community nodes
3. Cold outreach to 5 indie Product Hunt launches with genuine value-add propositions
4. Create GitHub Sponsors profile if not already done, attach to contributions

budget_estimates_by_category.rapidapi_integration: 20-30% revenue share on API calls, ongoing
budget_estimates_by_category.gitcoin_grants: Quadratic matching — time donation can attract significant funding
